title: Kangaroo plush — tail tears mended and restuffed
description: This kangaroo came in with tears, worst at the tail. We deep cleaned, patched the fabric, and restuffed so the plush sits upright and feels solid again.
itemDetails: This brown kangaroo plush with tan pouch is in the Australian souvenir-animal plush category, widely sold through tourism and gift channels for decades. Kangaroo plush designs are usually generic unless tags identify a specific wildlife brand or museum line. Typical materials are polyester faux-fur fabrics, polyester fill, and stitched details around muzzle, paws, and pouch.
repairDetails: This brown kangaroo plush had significant wear, especially tears at the tail. We deep cleaned the plush, repaired tears (with extra care at the tail), and restuffed for an even finish.
